channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ivanka Trump reportedly targeted in foiled assassination plot by IRGC-trained terrorist
item.description: Ivanka Trump was allegedly a target of an assassination plot by a terrorist trained by Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps.

item.title: U.S. and Iran expected to announce peace deal within 24 hours
item.description: The U.S. and Iran are set to announce a peace deal ending all hostilities by Sunday afternoon, according to a source.

item.title: Travel industry concerned after Trump administration renews threat to sanctuary city airports
item.description: The travel sector is anxious after Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin repeated a warning to remove CBP agents from sanctuary city airports.

item.title: The Trump Slush Fund Is an Abuse of Political Power, Not a Legal Wrong
item.description: Trump is repeating actions taken by Democrats, but with more flair.
